from __future__ import annotations

from typing import overload


@overload
def _parse(value: int) -> int:
    ...


@overload
def _parse(value: str) -> int:
    ...


def _parse(value: int | str) -> int:
    if isinstance(value, int):
        return value
    return int(value)


def overloaded_dispatch_without_typing_overload_decorator_negative(value: int | str) -> int:
    return _parse(value)
